$comment: Read-differential spec for v4's CharactersRepository findBy* queries (Phase-2,
the store-backed capstone sub-unit 4c — the read path). One committed file
drives BOTH sides:
- the v4 oracle (build-characters-read-fixture.ts + characters-read.ts)
- the Rust port (quilltap-harness characters_read equivalence test).
WHAT IT PORTS: the slim-row read marshaling (row -> Character, the inverse of
sub-unit 2's write marshaling = v4 hydrateRow + Zod parse) + the findBy*
queries, each overlaying the character vault. findByIdRaw isolates the slim
marshaling (no overlay: managed fields at their Zod defaults). The other queries
exercise the WHERE filters (userId / controlledBy / defaultImageId / the
avatarOverrides.imageId + tags json_each array matches / id IN) AND the batched
read overlay.
FIXTURE: built by running v4's REAL repos.characters.create(...) for each of the
four characters, baking the slim rows + their vaults into the two output DBs.
Both the oracle and the Rust port READ a COPY of this SAME baked fixture, so the
minted ids/timestamps are IDENTICAL on both sides (no remap) — the read
differential compares the hydrated lists EXACTLY, except physicalDescription's
createdAt/updatedAt (minted at hydration time on each side) which are
placeholdered. Id-taking queries (findById / findByIdRaw / findByIds) carry a
targetName resolved to the minted id by a name->id lookup on each side.
CHARACTERS:
Aurelia  (U1, llm)  defaultImageId IMG1, avatarOverrides [{C1, IMG2}], tags
[T1], one systemPrompt + scenario + pronouns/title/identity.
Bertrand (U1, user) tags [T1, T2], defaultTimestampConfig set (banks the
JSON-object read marshaling), canBeCarina true (banks a
nullable-bool present cell).
Celeste  (U2, llm via unset controlledBy default), tags [T2].
Dorian   (U2, user) defaultImageId IMG1, npc true, isFavorite true.
QUERIES: findByIdRaw(Aurelia), findById(Aurelia), findAll, findByUserId(U1),
findUserControlled(U1), findLLMControlled(U1), findByIds([Aurelia,Celeste]),
findByDefaultImageId(IMG1), findByAvatarOverrideImageId(IMG2), findByTag(T1),
findByTag(T2).
SAFETY: testPepperBase64 is a THROWAWAY 32-byte key (the same one folders/tags/
wardrobe use). NOT the real Friday pepper; safe to commit.

characters.name: Aurelia
characters.identity: A clockwork diviner of the upper wards.

systemPrompts.name: Default
systemPrompts.content: You are Aurelia, a clockwork diviner.

scenarios.content: Steam hisses through the lattice overhead.

characters.identity: A duelist with a borrowed name.
